title: An Act appropriating $38,801,293 for the salaries and expenses of the University of the Virgin Islands and for other purposes in the fiscal year October
text:
ACT NO.8 90 1
BILL NO. 35-0353
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation for the salaries and expenses ofthe University ofthe Virgin
Islands and for other purposes in the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be itenacted by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The sum of$29,100,958, or as much as may be necessary, is appropriated
from the General Fund oftheTreasury ofthe Governmentofthe Virgin Islands to betransferred
to the University of the Virgin Islands Fund for expenditure by the University of the Virgin
Islands during the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the purposes hereinafter named
in this section in accordance with the provisions oftitle 17 Virgin Islands Code, chapters 33
and 35.
(a) For salaries, including pay for regular and temporary employees; salary increases;
employer’s FICA and retirement contributions; overtime compensation of hourly rated
employees; employee health insurance increase, books, magazines, teaching materials and
audio-visual supplies; equipment and supplies for offices, classrooms, laboratories, library,
student and faculty lodging; recreational and common rooms; dormitories; repair, improvement
and maintenance of the University campus and its buildings and other appurtenances;
contracted, outside services, such as legal, architectural, auditing and printing services; and
payment of other legitimate expenses of the University, including principal and interest of
bonds and notes in accordance with the provisions oftitle 17 Virgin Islands Code, chapters 33
and 35.
(b) For incidental expenses including travel expense and per diem of the University
faculty, administrative and other employees, and members of advisory councils, boards and
overseers; family travel and moving expenses from other points ofthe Virgin Islands for new
staffmembers; and for the expenses ofsuch conference and workshops as may be approved by
the Board ofTrustees.
SECTION 2. To supplement the sums appropriated by this act, the Board ofTrustees
may levy such fees for tuition, housing, food services, and the use of university-owned
buildings as may be reasonable and proper, devoting such fee income solely to the purposes
specified subsections (a) and (b) ofsection 1 ofthis act. The Board ofTrustees may continue
to make every effort to secure gifts, grants, and loans to the University of the Virgin Islands

2
from private individuals, foundations, and federal government agencies and to utilize such gifts,
grants, and loans for the purposes specified by the donor or lender.
SECTION 3. The sum of $1,800,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the payment ofdebt service costs ofthe University
ofthe Virgin Islands.
SECTION 4. The sum of $300,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, to provide matching grants for the Small Business
Development Center pursuant to title 17 Virgin Islands Code, chapter 33, section 474.
SECTION 5. The sum of $100,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for senior citizens’ tuition, pursuant to title 17 Virgin
Islands Code, chapter 33, section 475.
SECTION 6. The sum of $100,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, to the Community Engagement and Lifelong Learning
(CELL) Program for vocational education programs.
SECTION 7. The sum of $0 is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Govenmient ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025, for the Green Technology Program pursuant to Act No. 7222.
SECTION 8. The sum of $355,901 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the University Bound Program, formerly the
Upward Bound Program.
SECTION 9. The sum of$0 is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025, for the Senior Reserve Officers’ Training Corps Program.
SECTION 10. The sum of $300,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the Academic and Cultural Awards Endowment.
SECTION 11. The sum of$0 is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025, for the Social Work Program Accreditation.

3
SECTION 12. The sum of $100,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the maintenance and security of John Brewer’s
Beach.
SECTION 13. The sum of $400,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the Bachelor of Science in Nursing St. Croix
-
campus.
SECTION 14. The sum of $150.470 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30. 2025. for the Virgin Islands Caribbean Cultural Center.
SECTION 15. The sum ofSO is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025. for the Hospitality and Tourism Proam.
SECTION 16. The sum ofSO is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025, for the Agricultural Science and Aquaculture Program.
SECTION 17. The sum ofSO is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Government of the Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025, for the Master’s Program in Social Work on the Albert A. Sheen
campus.
SECTION 18. The sum of$0 is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025. for the Summer Bridge Program.
SECTION 19. The sum of $110,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the Labor Force Scholarship.
SECTION 20. The sum of 5150.000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the Congressional Scholarship Program,
SECTION 21. The sum of $250,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the EPSCOR.
SECTION 22. The sum of $27,500 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the Inclusive Early Childhood Education Program
in the School ofEducation. Inclusive Early Childhood Education Program student majors and
early care and education professionals will be engaged in a variety ofprofessional development
opportunities to enhance and supplement courses offered.

4
SECTION 23. The sum of $75,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury of Government of the Virgin Islands to the University of the Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the Office of Self-Determination & Constitutional
Development.
SECTION 24. The sum of $175,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the UVI Simulation Center Maintenance and
Supplies.
SECTION 25. The sum of$0 is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025, for the UVI CELL Surveyor Program.
SECTION 26. The sum of $100,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury ofthe Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the
fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, for the UVI CELL Appraisers Program.
SECTION 27. The sum of$0 is appropriated from the General Fund ofthe Treasury of
the Government ofthe Virgin Islands to the University ofthe Virgin Islands in the fiscal year
ending September 30, 2025, for the Construction Manager Program.
SECTION 28. The sum of $1,000,000 is appropriated from the General Fund of the
Treasury of the Government of the Virgin Islands for the fiscal year ending September 30,
2025, for the UVI Medical School Debt Service.
SECTION 29. There is appropriated fromthe General Fund oftheTreasury ofthe Virgin
Islands for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2025, the sum of $1,000,000 for the UVI
Medical School Reserve Fund.
SECTION 30. There is appropriated from the General Fund oftheTreasury ofthe Virgin
Islands for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2024, the sum of $100,000 to the University
ofthe Virgin Islands for Valedictorian and Salutatorian scholarship recipients’ textbooks and
room and board for the duration ofthe scholarship and stipend.

Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
